textByHashes.6a3f6aa8f47be293473ce5bf4febcdfc27e46a5e: Bring some of the heavy squad to carry the crates.
textByHashes.35bc29b488108757deb4fb5ad3ab67cb91644b52: Get this right and I'll see you're well paid.
textByHashes.ab87e0b2dd96d8b1da9024a81d32c7b118206eb8: If the shopkeeper won't cooperate, kill his wife.
textByHashes.fcdc8c3e7eb610f325d4ec171abfd350d39fba2c: If the soldiers try to interfere, kill them.
textByHashes.c1e85a359d3e500cc786333e8db3b775e632c4db: Make sure the captain knows not to talk.
textByHashes.6b448acdce7e636f05eccff77647458ac60e5321: Our ship is due with the evening tide.
textByHashes.4924acfb4c3fe9441297bb6d13dca2a063bf60e7: Pay attention or I'll rip your throat out.
textByHashes.e566714f3aabc19afb41b780c8dc747dc05869e2: The boxes marked with a cross are ours.
textByHashes.d6fcc99acb9422e0bdab9ea96f04f71b7805bffe: Weigh the gold carefully in case he double-crosses us.
